name: OPT-IML 30B
note: Instruction-tuned OPT fine-tuned on a curated ~1,500-task subset of the OPT-IML Bench, with the remaining tasks held out for downstream evaluation; early instruction-tuning at scale. (OPT-IML-Max is a separate sibling checkpoint trained on the full ~2,000-task bench.)
tpsNote: llama.cpp does not support the OPT architecture, so no RTX 4090 llama.cpp figure exists even though the Q4 footprint would fit in 24GB.
verificationNotes: Confirmed 30B params, 2048 ctx, and 2022-12-22 arxiv date (fetched arxiv abstract page submission history: 'v1 Thu, 22 Dec 2022'). CRITICAL CORRECTION: the input's 3 benchmark rows (MMLU 46.3 0-shot, BBH 30.9 3-shot, RAFT 69.3 5-shot) are misattributed — fetching arxiv 2212.12017 directly shows these exact figures live only in Table 14 for 'OPT-IML-Max 30B' (trained on the full ~1,991-task bench), a distinct sibling checkpoint from plain 'OPT-IML 30B' (this record, trained on a curated subset of ~1,500 tasks with the rest held out for eval). The paper does not report MMLU/BBH/RAFT for the non-Max OPT-IML 30B, so all 3 result rows were dropped per verification rules. Also corrected the model note, which had incorrectly described this checkpoint as trained on the full ~2,000-task bench (that describes OPT-IML-Max, not OPT-IML).
